tool_args.label: Operations Performance Summary description
tool_args.raw_text: Summary presentation on the performance of Subway and Bus Service, including a discussion on Safety, Finance and Ridership. Information includes discussion on key indicators for Subway and Bus Customer-Focused and Performance metrics.

payload.claim_text: Summary presentation on the performance of Subway and Bus Service, including a discussion on Safety, Finance and Ridership. Information includes discussion on key indicators for Subway and Bus Customer-Focused and Performance metrics.
payload.description: Description of the recurring Operations Performance Summary agenda item, presented by NYCT President & MTA Bus Co. President

evidence_refs.source_quote: Summary presentation on the performance of Subway and Bus Service, including a discussion on Safety, Finance and Ridership.
Information includes discussion on key indicators for Subway and Bus Customer-Focused and Performance metrics.

tool_args.label: Procurements description
tool_args.raw_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval and items for Committee and Board information. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications.

payload.claim_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval and items for Committee and Board information. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.
payload.description: Description of the recurring Procurements agenda item

evidence_refs.source_quote: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval and items for Committee and Board information. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.

issues: evidence_refs[1].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: Biannual Customer Satisfaction Report description
tool_args.raw_text: Recurring presentation of customer satisfaction ratings about NYCT's bus, subway, and paratransit services. Report will identify trends from customer surveys results about key indicators and attributes that define the customer experience.

tool_args.label: Fare Evasion Report description
tool_args.raw_text: Quarterly report to the Committee which provides estimated revenue lost to fare evasion on subways and buses based on staff surveys of stations and routes.

tool_args.label: ADA Compliance Report description
tool_args.raw_text: The annual update to the NYCT Committee on the status of compliance with the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) at New York City Transit. The report summarizes activities for compliance including, rehabilitation of key stations and ADA requirements in bus and subway transportation.
